<!--
Thanks for contributing to Cogniplane! A few notes:

- One logical change per PR. Easier to review, easier to revert.
- The CLA bot will comment on your first PR — sign once, applies to all future PRs.
- CI runs lint, typecheck, tests, and license-check on every PR.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this change do? -->

## Why

<!-- Optional. The motivation if it's not obvious from the summary. -->

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this works? New tests, manual repro, screenshots, etc. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (or N/A — explain)
- [ ] Lint and typecheck pass locally (`pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed (README, CLAUDE.md, docs/)
- [ ] CLA signed (the bot will prompt on your first PR)
